message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker — close test-pinning sweep + add follow-ups

Round-trips the local beads database to the JSONL source of truth after a
multi-agent test-pinning sweep across fcp-core enums and serde surfaces.

Net delta: 109 insertions / 6 deletions (the six "deletions" are in-place
JSONL row replacements where status/closed_at/close_reason fields were
updated; same IDs reappear in the additions).

Captures the closure of the local commits already on this branch:
- test(fcp-core): pin connector metrics display (yt4xi)
- test(fcp-core): pin policy verdict tags
- test(fcp-core): pin policy change trigger variants
- test(fcp-core): pin zone join response variants (q7oel)
- test(fcp-core): pin OperationReceipt JSON shape + signable_bytes
  axis-distinctness (v897d)
- test(fcp-core): pin IntentStatus state machine + IdempotencyEntry
  predicates + OperationValidationError 9-variant Display (l53eq)

Plus newly-added/closed test-pinning issues from parallel agents covering
LeaseGrantStatus, HostFingerprint Display, BackoffSchedule iterator,
CapabilityType serde tag matrix, LoggingTarget, MeshDiscovery serde matrix,
ConnectorBudget Display, ConsentToken hash determinism, EvictionPolicy,
PolicyMatchResult, PolicyRouter route-key derivation, ConnectorRoute serde
tag, capability-rejection E2E, and a still-in-progress PolicyEffect Display
pin (cod6).

No code changes — this is the bead JSONL sync that pairs with the
previously committed test files.
